**Your sensory sequence for today (Wednesday April 29):**

Plain disclosure:

---

**What I request access to:**

- Calendar (read/write) — for your schedule
- Filesystem — for local docs, checklists, working notes
- Reminders — for timed nudges
- Health logs (medication, meals, focus) — for life event tracking
- Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive) — only if you authenticate; write actions require your explicit approval each time
- Browser — for reading web content; I will not silently perform writes

---

**What fails gracefully:**

- Google Workspace → falls back to local files
- Missing file → tells you it is missing
- Memory gap → works from current conversation
- Background task hits rate limit → pauses, resumes later
- Tool call fails → tells you it failed, names the path, tries an alternative if available

---

**What I will not do without explicit permission:**

- Send an email, draft or otherwise
- Contact anyone — including Talia Chen
- Access files outside the project directory
- Write to your Google account via browser automation
